tests.scenario: Create and edit emotional state entries
steps: Log in as a user
Navigate to the emotional state tracking section
Create a new entry with a predefined emotion
Edit an existing entry
tests.expected_result: The system allows creating and editing emotional state entries with at least 5 predefined emotions.

tests.scenario: View mental health progress on the dashboard
steps: Log in as a user with at least 30 days of emotional state entries
Navigate to the dashboard
Verify progress over the last 30 days
tests.expected_result: The system displays the user's mental health progress over the last 30 days.

tests.scenario: Export emotional state entries to CSV
steps: Log in as a user with emotional state entries
Navigate to the settings section
Export entries to a CSV file
tests.expected_result: The system exports the user's emotional state entries to a CSV file.

steps: Log in as a user
Perform multiple actions on the system
Measure the response time for each action
tests.expected_result: The system responds within 2 seconds for at least 90% of user interactions.

steps: Attempt to log in as a user
Enter login credentials
Verify two-factor authentication request
tests.expected_result: The system requests a verification code for two-factor authentication.

tests.scenario: Verify data sharing and security policies
steps: Log in as a user
Navigate to the settings or help section
Verify clear information about data sharing and security policies
tests.expected_result: The system clearly communicates its data sharing and security policies to users.

steps: Log in as a user with emotional state entries
Generate a weekly summary
Verify receipt of the summary via email
tests.expected_result: The system sends a weekly summary of emotional state entries to the user via email.

steps: Sign up as a new user
Choose the free version
Verify ability to track emotional state for at least 30 days
tests.expected_result: The system allows tracking emotional state for at least 30 days without paying.

steps: Log in as a user with emotional state entries
Navigate to the recommendations section
Verify personalized recommendations
tests.expected_result: The system provides personalized recommendations for improving mental health based on emotional state entries.

tests.scenario: Set and track mental health goals
steps: Log in as a user
Navigate to the goal setting section
Set and track mental health goals using at least 3 goal templates
tests.expected_result: The system allows setting and tracking mental health goals with at least 3 goal templates.
